issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile speed-runner
Monitor card type distribution during run
Check if "wild" cards appear in deck
